overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair crossing a neon-lit intersection in Night City. The character navigates through futuristic traffic including a red truck, military vehicle, and teal sedan before walking along the sidewalk past the camera. The scene features heavy neon signage, billboards, and a distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with purple and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with neon billboards

events.description: red pickup truck drives through intersection from right to left
military-style armored vehicle passes in front of the character's path

agents.ego_description: character walks across the yellow-striped crosswalk from the far side toward the camera, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving left across the intersection
armored military vehicle passing in front of the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical billboard displaying a face with green neon trim
building facade with prominent red neon Asian characters
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT XING text
suspended traffic signals showing red lights over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a neon-drenched intersection in a futuristic city at night. The character begins crossing the wide street from the far side while a red truck and military vehicle pass through the intersection. Tall buildings with glowing billboards and neon signage frame the scene.

events.description: teal vintage-style sedan drives across the intersection from left to right
character slows slightly to allow the teal car to pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: character continues crossing the street, pausing briefly to let the teal sedan pass before reaching the near sidewalk

notable_agents.action: teal vintage sedan driving right across the intersection

entered.detail: black futuristic sedan waiting at the intersection edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues traversing the crosswalk as a distinctive teal vintage car drives past. The camera remains focused on the crossing action as the character approaches the near side of the street, with the neon-lit building facades remaining visible in the background.

events.description: character steps off the crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk
camera pans left to follow the character walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character with distinctive red hair wearing a gray suit walks along the sidewalk toward and then past the camera

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking in the background along the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with green and purple neon accents and large digital displays
concrete sidewalk with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character steps onto the sidewalk and the camera pans left to follow. The character, revealing red hair and a suit, walks toward the camera along the neon-lit sidewalk before passing by. The background shows additional building facades with digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a neon-drenched urban intersection that shifts from a wide street crossing to a close-up encounter on a futuristic sidewalk. It begins with the character traversing a wide road framed by glowing billboards and towering buildings as a red truck and a military vehicle pass through the intersection. As the character continues across the crosswalk, a distinctive teal vintage car drives past, maintaining the focus on the crossing action against the backdrop of vibrant building facades. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the near sidewalk, where the camera pans left to follow their progress. Finally, the character, revealing red hair and a suit, walks directly toward and then past the camera along the neon-lit path beneath digital billboards.
